patterns.title: extractBashPrefix pipe/semicolon blindness
patterns.root_cause: Command prefix extraction splits only on pipe character, ignoring shell command separators (; && ||)

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: strings.Split($CMD, "|") where $CMD is user-controlled bash command

patterns.title: Shell expansion in path arguments bypasses lexical path validation
patterns.root_cause: path.Clean is lexical-only; shell metacharacters $() {} `` pass through uninterpreted

patterns.title: safeCommands without flag analysis
patterns.root_cause: Command safety classification ignores flags that change command behavior from read to write/execute

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: map[string]bool containing sed or find as safe without -i/-exec analysis

patterns.title: Substring deny-pattern without whitespace normalization
patterns.root_cause: strings.Contains pattern matching without collapsing whitespace allows double-space bypass

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: strings.Contains($INPUT, $PATTERN) where $INPUT has no whitespace normalization

patterns.title: Per-tool approval without argument scoping
patterns.root_cause: Non-bash tool allowlist stores tool name only, granting blanket access regardless of arguments

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: $MAP[$TOOLNAME] = true where $TOOLNAME is tool identifier without argument scope

patterns.title: Single-path assumption in multi-argument commands
patterns.root_cause: Path extraction returns after first path argument; additional path arguments are unchecked

detection_signature.grep: return.*prefix after first path arg without checking remaining args
detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: for loop with early return after first path match, missing subsequent argument validation

patterns.title: Cross-Origin Unauthenticated API Chain
patterns.root_cause: CORS permits dangerous origins (file://, vscode-webview://) to access destructive API endpoints with no authentication

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: AllowOrigins containing file://* or vscode-webview://* without route-level CORS separation

patterns.title: JSON Unknown Field Pre-Positioning
patterns.root_cause: Go json.Unmarshal silently ignores unknown fields, allowing attackers to pre-position payloads in stored JSON that activate when schema evolves

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: json.Unmarshal($DATA, &$STRUCT) where $STRUCT stores to disk without DisallowUnknownFields

patterns.title: Missing Manifest Digest Verification
patterns.root_cause: OCI manifest response body not verified against Docker-Content-Digest header

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: io.ReadAll($RESP.Body) followed by json.Unmarshal without digest comparison

patterns.title: Content-Type Confusion in OCI Manifest
patterns.root_cause: Response Content-Type not validated when fetching OCI manifests

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: Accept header set but response Content-Type never checked before parsing

patterns.title: Middleware Bypass on Non-Loopback Bind
patterns.root_cause: Access control middleware unconditionally skips when server is bound to non-loopback address

patterns.title: GGUF unchecked uint64-to-int cast in parser
patterns.root_cause: Uint64 value from binary input cast to signed int without sign/bounds check; negative result used as slice index

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: $VAR := int($OBJ.Uint64($BUF)) without bounds check before slice use

confirmed_instances: fs/ggml/gguf.go:437 -- readGGUFArray int(n) element count cast (p10-045)

patterns.title: GGUF unbounded allocation via disabled size limit sentinel
patterns.root_cause: Size limit parameter uses -1 sentinel to mean unlimited; create path passes -1, disabling all allocation guards
confirmed_instances: convert/reader_safetensors.go:39 -- parseSafetensors make([]byte,0,n) no bounds check (p10-048)

patterns.title: GGUF divide-by-zero via attacker-controlled divisor
patterns.root_cause: KV metadata value used as modulo divisor without zero-check; value=0 causes panic

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: $X % $ALIGN where $ALIGN from kv.Uint without zero guard

patterns.title: GGUF tensor size overflow bypasses bounds check
patterns.root_cause: uint64 shape product overflow wraps to 0; unknown tensor Kind returns typeSize=0; both make Size()=0 which trivially passes bounds check

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: count *= $N in loop without overflow check on uint64

confirmed_instances: fs/ggml/gguf.go:258-262 -- bounds check defeated by Size()=0

patterns.title: Content-Disposition filename path traversal in updater
patterns.root_cause: Server-controlled Content-Disposition filename used in filepath.Join without sanitization, enabling write to arbitrary filesystem paths

detection_signature.semgrep: pattern: filepath.Join(, , params["filename"]) without filepath.Base or containment check
